quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure, e.g. Gadget's '$2,392.00 in revenue, about 33.4% of the total' and 'North outperformed West by roughly 53.8%, a gap of $761.53.'

specificity.why: Every recommendation names products/regions and data, e.g. 'Prioritize Gadget stock' and 'Bundle Sprocket with higher-priced items to lift its low per-order revenue contribution.'

insight_density.why: Multiple non-obvious, actionable observations, e.g. 'Sprocket moves the most units but earns the least revenue, reflecting its low $4.75 price' and Gadget delivering a third of revenue 'from only 16 units sold.'

quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure — Gadget's 'about 33.4% of the total,' 'North outperformed West by roughly 53.8%, a gap of $761.53,' and unit/price breakdowns.

specificity.why: Each recommendation names products and data-grounded figures — 'Prioritize Gadget stock... a third of revenue from the fewest units,' 'Investigate West's weaker sales; it lags North by over half,' and 'Bundle Sprocket with higher-priced items.'

insight_density.why: Surfaces several non-obvious points — 'Sprocket moves the most units but earns the least revenue, reflecting its low $4.75 price,' Gadget's revenue-per-unit dominance, and West lagging 'despite a similar order count.'

quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure — Gadget is '33.4% of the total', North 'outperformed West by roughly 53.8%, a gap of $761.53', and Sprocket's low revenue is tied to its '$4.75 price'.

specificity.why: Each recommendation names a product and figures and is actionable as written, e.g. 'Prioritize Gadget stock... it delivers a third of revenue from the fewest units' and 'Bundle Sprocket with higher-priced items to lift its low per-order revenue contribution.'

insight_density.why: It surfaces multiple non-obvious, actionable observations such as Gadget's revenue concentration 'from only 16 units sold', the inverse 'Sprocket moves the most units but earns the least revenue', and West lagging 'despite a similar order count.'
